programmes.show_description: How news bulletins used to look. The GREAT! network takes you back in time, remembering stories from this week back then.

Disaster drama with Paul Walker. In the chaos of Hurricane Katrina, a stranded man clings to hope and a hospital ventilator as he tries to keep his newborn daughter alive with no help in sight (2013).
Whilst captive on a freighter, Mannering and Cordelia uncover a plot to steal an American space capsule. Can they escape the ship and alert the US navy to the crew's nefarious plan?
The team investigate a sudden spate of deaths involving MP's and members of the intelligence services. Although evidence suggests they all died of natural causes, the team suspect foul play .

Western starring Sterling Hayden. After the Civil War a rancher is wrongfully imprisoned in a notorious desert prison. When a deadly plague threatens to overwhelm the jail, can he help stop it? (1952)

programmes.show_description: Fiery drama with Michael Ironside. Things heat up when an underground experiment blows the lid off Manhattan - literally. With lava in the streets, a construction crew must plug the meltdown. (2006)

Hollister investigates when $30,000 in payroll money is stolen from the Army officer.
Hired killers have the run of the town after the end of a bloody range war, but one rancher whose son was killed wants revenge.
Embittered over the loss of his home and grandson in a fire during a bandit raid, Casement vows to track down the men responsible.
Steed believes he has finally cracked a case when he captures his nemesis. But when things go awry, the team and a member of the royal family suddenly find themselves in grave danger .
Fears mount when a British official's vivid dream about his impending death comes true. Can The Avengers keep his successor safe when he starts to have similar dreams about his own demise?
Mannering and Cordelia investigate a neo-Nazi organization who are selling off art treasures to fund their evil plans to gain dominance in Europe. Stopping them will prove to be a challenge.
